item.title: Eternal Committee Faces Existential Crisis Over Cough from Alleged Alchemical Transmutation
item.description: Sand-Scribe’s 0.3-Second Murmur Declared Grave Threat to Universe’s Sole Alchemical Precedent.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Memorial Lending Bastion Awarded Three-and-a-Half Stars Despite Minor Personality Loss During Latest Emergency
item.description: Patrons applaud the new molting pamphlets while lamenting their lost reflective surfaces.

item.title: Citizens Boast 100% Fiscal Loyalty After Overnight Compliance Crisis; Faces Seized, Dreams Taxed
item.description: In a startling demonstration of commitment, 3,482 residents undergo voluntary identity rebranding amidst mass sleep audits.

item.title: Corporate Moss-Grafts Render Gunpowder Obsolete, Executives Celebrate at Committee Luncheon
item.description: Competitors now exchanging procedural strikes via inter-board memos as void-passage opens for 'competitive synergy.'

item.title: Renaissance on Hold: Ir:Vess Promoted, Sand-Sculpture Permits Remain a Mirage
item.description: As aesthetic oversight takes precedence, safety becomes a sandcastle built on shifting dunes.

item.title: Oueiaaia Voting Trust Declares Alchemical Victory: All Petitions Now Available in Sparkling Dissolve!
item.description: Trust Reassigns Dissenters to Higher Towers Amidst Whirlwind of Euphoric Champagne Toasts.

item.title: Shoppers Glow with Delight as Virtue Unveils Atomic Neon 'Eternal Summer Sale'
item.description: Customers report 'fashionable burns' as mood-enhancing irradiation becomes the latest trend.

item.title: Flames of Freedom: Napoleon's Grill d'Empire Declares Culinary Warfare Over Paprika Catastrophe
item.description: From barbecue to battleground, Auria faces a sizzling crisis of culinary proportions.

item.title: Eternal Committee Slaps Subpoenas on Sand-Scribes: Alchemy as Tax Liability
item.description: Ess-9-Vahl Calls for 17-Volume Ledger to Become an Instrument of Revenue Collection, 47,000-Hertz Laments Not Included.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Heat-Corp Concedes: Lunar Broadcast Now a Self-Sustaining Ember-Wildfire
item.description: As absence-proxies incinerate profits, blame shifts from thermal mismanagement to existential sand erosion.
